name: smidr
description: SmiðrUI — a lightweight retained-mode UI toolkit for OpenFL. Two dozen themable widgets (buttons, lists, menus, sliders, inputs, modals and more) that repaint only when invalidated, with built-in vector icons, pluggable fonts and localization, and an optional Flixel bridge.
releasenote: UIPanel is now theme-following by default: its fill is a UIFill (a theme slot like PANEL/CARD that follows theme swaps, or a fixed ARGB colour -- existing UIPanel(w,h,0xAARRGGBB) calls behave as before). Adds UIWindow, UIDrawer, touch scrolling, long-press-as-right-click, mobile IME support and a scrollable widget gallery.
